title: Duplicate Emails
description: Find all emails that appear more than once in the Person table.
constraints: id is the primary key (unique per row)
Multiple rows can share the same email value
key_concept: GROUP BY + HAVING COUNT > 1 to find duplicates. HAVING filters aggregated groups.

hints.L1: Group by email and count occurrences. Filter groups where count > 1.
hints.L2: SELECT email FROM Person GROUP BY email HAVING COUNT(*) > 1.
hints.L3: SELECT email FROM Person GROUP BY email HAVING COUNT(email) > 1

optimal_solution: SELECT email FROM Person GROUP BY email HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
